asymptotic_transport_equivalence_certifi.equivalence_statement: Admissible transport choices differ only by the derived boundary recharting/gauge action, so they define one OPH-stable local *-isomorphism class on the quotient test system.

derived_remaining_input_witness_closure_: If the constructive recovery remainder and the faithful modular-defect term both vanish on every fixed local collar model, then the carried-collar schedule follows by termwise addition of the two nonnegative remainders.
notes: This artifact is constructive but not yet the realized scaling-limit cap pair.
It packages the prelimit transported cap-local system at the quotient/local *-isomorphism level only.
The carried-collar witness now comes with a finer lower local family: constructive recovery, exact-Markov comparison convergence, faithful modular-defect vanishing, then the full eta schedule.
The actual emitted solver frontier is the two-term pair beneath the derived eta schedule, not the schedule viewed as a separate primitive target.
The support gate makes explicit that this prelimit package is still insufficient on its own for cap-pair promotion.
The remaining emitted witnesses for cap-pair promotion are the constructive-recovery and faithful modular-defect terms on fixed local collar models.

compatibility: isotony of the directed local family
channel composition along the realized refinement chain
projectively_compatible_transported_cap_.construction: For n ≥ m, define ω_{n→m}^{(χ)}(X) = ω_{ℓ_n}(τ_{n→m}^{(χ)}(X)), where τ_{n→m}^{(χ)} is refinement inclusion plus admissible recharting into the fixed reference chart.

reference_cap_local_test_system.construction: Fix one reference cut presentation/chart along the cap boundary and use rational matrix-coefficient cap-local subalgebras on supported local regions s ⊂ C as the directed test family T_{m,s} ⊂ A_m(s).

remaining_missing_witness_contract.for_fixed_models: every fixed local collar model (m, delta)
remaining_missing_witness_contract.meaning: Carried-collar remainder schedules vanish along the realized refinement chain after transport to one fixed collar model.

remaining_witness_obligation_ledger.formula: exists lambda_bar_{m,delta} > 0 and N_{m,delta} such that for all n >= N_{m,delta} and every X in Xi^{mod}_{m,delta}, rho_{n->m,X} >= lambda_bar_{m,delta} * 1

insufficient_on_their_own.why_not: This removes only the Fawzi-Renner recovery term; it does not control the separate faithfulness-weighted modular defect remainder.
This only controls distance to the exact-Markov set; it does not by itself bound the spectral-weighted modular defect term.
This still omits the separate Fawzi-Renner recovery remainder, so the full eta schedule is not yet emitted.
The prelimit transport package fixes the local system but does not itself emit the vanishing carried-collar schedule consumed by cap-pair extraction.

remaining_witness_support_gate.promotion_rule: No theorem promotion is supported until the carried-collar schedule itself is emitted on every fixed local collar model.
required_raw_inputs: exists lambda_bar_{m,delta} > 0 and N_{m,delta} such that for all n >= N_{m,delta} and every X in Xi^{mod}_{m,delta}, rho_{n->m,X} >= lambda_bar_{m,delta} * 1

remaining_witness_term_frontier.closure_theorem: If the constructive recovery remainder and the faithful modular-defect term both vanish on every fixed local collar model, then the carried-collar schedule follows by termwise addition of the two nonnegative remainders.
remaining_witness_term_frontier.why_this_sharpens_the_frontier: The carried-collar schedule is no longer treated as an independent primitive solver target; the actual emitted frontier is the two-term pair that generates it.

role: Package the quotient/local *-isomorphism-level transported cap-local system that the scaling-limit cap-pair extraction theorem uses as input.

components: exists lambda_bar_{m,delta} > 0 and N_{m,delta} such that for all n >= N_{m,delta} and every X in Xi^{mod}_{m,delta}, rho_{n->m,X} >= lambda_bar_{m,delta} * 1
smaller_remaining_raw_datum.role: raw fixed-local-collar datum that implies the eta schedule once emitted
